name: LeetCode Discussion
description: Join an active community of problem solvers to explore LeetCode challenges in-depth. Discuss optimal approaches, time and space complexity, and strategies to tackle daily problems and interview preparations. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned coder, this room offers support for contests, company-specific questions, and peer review.

name: GFG Discussion
description: Dive into GeeksforGeeks articles, practice problems, and placement archives with like-minded learners. Share solutions, ask doubts, and learn from community insights on data structures, algorithms, and real-world coding problems. A go-to space for acing internships and off-campus drives with GFG resources.

name: Codeforces Discussion
description: Engage in deep dives into Codeforces contests, virtual participation experiences, and editorial breakdowns. Perfect for competitive programmers aiming to increase their rating, sharpen problem-solving skills, and stay updated on round announcements and preparation strategies from top-rated coders.

name: CodeChef Discussion
description: Share your CodeChef experiences, from cook-offs to long challenges. This room helps you analyze past contest problems, discuss edge cases, and learn from top performers. Ideal for improving consistency, learning STL tricks, and building a portfolio of solved problems for internships and placements.

name: DSA General
description: A central hub for anything and everything related to Data Structures and Algorithms. Whether you're revising recursion, exploring graph theory, or struggling with segment trees, this room provides collaborative learning, resources, and peer mentorship. Ideal for cracking technical rounds in top product companies.
